personal.name: Usama Rabie
personal.title: MERN Stack Developer & Web Developer

personal.bio: I am a MERN Stack developer with experience in building full-stack web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js. I have made several projects, including a food order app with Next.js and Redux toolkit, and an e-commerce app with React JS.

activities: Instructor in ICPC Minya september 2022 – september 2023
Vice HR in ICPC Minya september 2022 – september 2023
HR member, IEEE Minya student branch 2021 - 2022
Mentor in ICPC Minya 2021 – 2022 (train students in problem solving)
